name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Research admin polish: a dashboard landing at the Research nav (published/draft counts, latest report, quick actions) with Add-new-report (upload PDF or blank draft) and Manage-reports live, and the send-side tiles (subscribers, last campaign, scheduled sends, email analytics) shown as grayed Coming-in-Phase-2 placeholders. Fixes the missing upload-PDF entry point. Dresses the research admin in the editorial sub-brand (Fraunces / IBM Plex Mono, navy ink) to match the public research site, with those fonts still scoped to the research route group only. No schema or dependency changes.
